---
title: "pecan_run_model"
output: html_document
---




```{r}
SETTINGS_TEMPLATE <- list(outdir = character(1),
                          modeloutdir = character(1),
                          rundir = character(1),
                          run = list(
                            site = list(),
                            start.date = character(1),
                            end.date = character(1),
                            inputs = list()
                          ))
```
